category_sources: Official docs https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/nuget/ say NuGet is the package manager for .NET.
source_facts.description says Package manager for Microsoft development platform including .NET.
display_name_sources: Official Microsoft Learn docs https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/nuget/ use NuGet branding.
docs_sources: Official Microsoft Learn NuGet documentation at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/nuget/.
repo_sources: Official NuGet.Client repository README says its official location is https://github.com/NuGet/NuGet.Client and contains NuGet CLI/client tools.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/NuGet/NuGet.Client topics include package-manager, dotnet, nuget, nupkg, and nuget-cli.
source_facts.description identifies NuGet as package manager for Microsoft/.NET development.
